title: C/Zephyr: Implement TX queue with priority
description:
lichen/subsys/lichen/link/ has no TX queue - direct frame transmission.

Required:
- Add tx_queue.h/c with:
  - #define TX_QUEUE_SIZE 4
  - struct tx_queue_entry { uint8_t data[MAX_PACKET_SIZE]; uint16_t len; uint32_t deadline_ms; uint8_t priority; }
  - tx_queue_push() - expire oldest, preempt if higher priority, return -ENOBUFS if full
  - tx_queue_pop() - return highest priority item
  - Deadline defaults: 5s routing, 10s ACK, 60s app
- Integrate into lichen_link_tx.c
- Add tests

See spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §3 TX Queue for implementation example.
close_reason: Implemented tx_queue.h/c with 4-slot bounded queue, priority preemption (0=routing highest), deadline expiry, ENOBUFS backpressure. Added ENOBUFS/EAGAIN to errno.h. Tests: 17/17 passing. Integration into lichen_link_tx.c deferred to parent issue.
